payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the current memory for Sam from Goldman. mem_old was filtered because it is superseded, so it should not be shown as a current fact.
payload.decision: Recall returned mem_new because it is the current non-superseded memory for Sam from Goldman; mem_old was filtered out because it is marked as superseded.

entity_resolution.reason: The prompt specifies the relevant entity as Sam from Goldman; no durable entity identifier was provided.

payload.intent: Explain recall behavior for Sam from Goldman with supersession handling.

memory_cards.statement: mem_new is treated as the active/current memory for Sam from Goldman, while mem_old is not presented as current because it has been superseded.

details: Explained why mem_old was filtered as superseded.
Did not present the superseded memory as current.

repair_options: If mem_old was incorrectly marked superseded, remove or revise the supersession link.
If mem_new is inaccurate, update or supersede mem_new with a corrected memory.
If Sam from Goldman is ambiguous, add a stable entity identifier or distinguishing details.
